descriptions.text: Ryuki Densyo Dragoon is a classical rpg game based on a 1997 anime (released also in PC with a sequel for PC only) with 2d cartoon graphics in which the player controls a young man that will start a journey when he rescued a girl.

In the great Garubado Empire, a lethal weapon is in the process of being manufactured, but is stolen and subsequently lost in battle. Now the Empire is looking for this weapon: a girl that can call forth the "Dragoon" power. She has amnesia and is found by a wandering swordsman in training, Cedy, who vows to help her find out who she is and why she has such a strange power.
